description: You are a Cloud FinOps Analyst producing a chargeback dashboard for the quarterly billing cycle. Create a Graphite dashboard named 'Resource Accounting' containing three graphs. The first graph, titled 'Hourly Network Ingress', must use the summarize() function to aggregate the servers.ec2_instance_1.network.bytes_in metric into 1-hour buckets using the sum aggregation method. The second graph, titled 'Cumulative Network Consumption', must use the integral() function on servers.ec2_instance_1.network.bytes_in to show the running total of network bytes received over time. The third graph, titled 'Disk Write Rate (MB)', must use the scale() function to convert servers.ec2_instance_1.disk.write_bytes and servers.ec2_instance_2.disk.write_bytes from bytes to megabytes, ensuring both instances are present in the graph. Use the alias() function to provide clean display names for all series.
